title: Potential Economic Impact of Fixing the Inverted Customs Duty Structure: The Case of Indian Viscose Fibers

summary.about: The effect of removing India’s tariff disadvantage on imported pulp used to make viscose fibre.
summary.audience: Textile and customs policymakers, viscose producers and trade analysts.
summary.method: Uses a GTAP CGE model to simulate correction of the inverted duty structure.
summary.insights: The reform is estimated to raise Indian GDP by about $18 million and exports by about $10.75 million.
